notes: Inferred placements are marked with rationale and must be revisited during runtime map integration.

V357: Main/NPC/animal coordinates are now canonical exact records after user-provided corrections plus mapper-pending promotion for absent PG/animals. The +30 X offset remains explicit in each position.

performanceBudget.eventConcurrencyPolicy: interactive events in the same zone/time band should be serialized or explicitly prioritized unless budget validation approves parallel availability
performanceBudget.liveSpriteDistancePolicy: main, npc, animal, and ambient sprites must keep readable spacing after coordinate offset reconciliation; exact spacing is runtime_pending until map validation
performanceBudget.comfortHazardPolicyV341: main/NPC/animal placements must be evaluated against sunny-only heat, shade/rest recovery, sprite-driven mosquito chase/bite threat, rain wetness, storm orientation loss, preparation/resilience, route effort, visibility, and sprite spacing. Safe fallback cells are review-only when they are not narratively/atmospherically correct; production exact promotion requires placement plus comfort-hazard and runtime map proof.

placements.placementRationale: Bee cloud ambience fits food, flowers, and trash zones during daytime.
validationNotes: Special direct asset; do not inflate to fake 8-frame standard loop.

placements.placementRationale: Mosquito cloud is a real sprite-driven comfort hazard: it should chase/bite only when the visible mosquito entity is active and near the player, not as a generic night timer.
validationNotes: Special direct asset; keep density capped.
V341 comfort hazard reads active mosquito sprite proximity, chase radius, and bite cooldown; do not inflate this direct asset into fake 8-frame loops.

placements.placementRationale: V361 x5 density: covers historic pinewood around the old yoga route with a real visible mosquito hazard sprite.
validationNotes: V361 density node 2/5. Keep separated from other mosquito clouds; special 25-frame atlas is preserved.

placements.placementRationale: V361 x5 density: second old-yoga pinewood coverage node so the adjacent historic pine sections feel populated without stacking clouds.
validationNotes: V361 density node 3/5. Keep separated from other mosquito clouds; special 25-frame atlas is preserved.

placements.placementRationale: V361 x5 density: covers the new far-west pinewood while staying a distinct, separated visible hazard.
validationNotes: V361 density node 4/5. Keep separated from other mosquito clouds; special 25-frame atlas is preserved.

placements.placementRationale: V361 x5 density: adds a sparse beach mosquito hazard in selected beach sections, still visible and avoidable.
validationNotes: V361 density node 5/5. Keep separated from other mosquito clouds; special 25-frame atlas is preserved.

placements.placementRationale: Starting hub/base is required by the management loop and must be represented before final art exists.
validationNotes: Placeholder asset; final footprint pending.
placements.temporaryRepresentation: dormant placeholder placement for starting hub footprint
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: tier_1 tent/piazzola world sprite with walkable footprint metadata
placements.validationRisk: final footprint, collision, visibility, and upgrade-state exclusivity pending runtime map validation

placements.placementRationale: Tier 2 hub upgrade needs explicit placeholder state.
validationNotes: Mutually exclusive with other hub tiers.
placements.temporaryRepresentation: dormant placeholder placement for upgraded hub footprint
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: tier_2 improved piazzola/canopy world sprite with footprint metadata
placements.validationRisk: final footprint, collision, visibility, and mutual exclusivity with other hub tiers pending runtime map validation

placements.placementRationale: Tier 3 camper-style hub upgrade needs explicit placeholder state.
validationNotes: Final art and footprint pending.
placements.temporaryRepresentation: dormant placeholder placement for final camper-style hub footprint
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: tier_3 camper or premium piazzola world sprite with footprint metadata
placements.validationRisk: largest footprint can block routes if not validated against walkability and visibility

placements.placementRationale: Wheelbarrow is player identity, inventory, and upgrade state; world/HUD representation remains placeholder.
validationNotes: Final HUD/world split pending.
placements.temporaryRepresentation: event-only placeholder for wheelbarrow identity, capacity, and upgrade state
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: wheelbarrow tier set plus HUD/world split contract
placements.validationRisk: must not duplicate player/world representation or desync inventory capacity

placements.placementRationale: Common stone pickup required by the core resource loop.
validationNotes: Spawn density pending.
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: small readable ciottolo pickup sprite with sparkle/outline variant
placements.validationRisk: spawn density, collision, and pickup readability pending runtime validation

placements.placementRationale: Medium-value shiny stone supports Lalla/quartz economy.
validationNotes: Visual placeholder pending.
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: quartz pickup sprite with readable highlight at raycaster distance
placements.validationRisk: night readability and value distinction pending visual QA

placements.placementRationale: Construction gravel dump is core intro/world premise and resource source.
validationNotes: Must not hide navigable route.
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: gravel dump/source sprite with non-blocking collision footprint
placements.validationRisk: must not hide navigable route or overload sprite density near intro area

placements.placementRationale: Heavy/high-value stone supports Bruno and final readiness economy.
validationNotes: Carry/inventory weight pending.
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: heavy basalt pickup sprite with clear weight/value silhouette
placements.validationRisk: inventory weight/carry rules and path obstruction pending gameplay integration

placements.placementRationale: Battle app is future external integration; current manifest maps won/lost switch only.
validationNotes: Must be easy to disable when battle app is integrated.
placements.recommendedFinalAsset: battle-app bridge that returns won/lost result and can replace the temporary switch
placements.validationRisk: must be easy to disable when real battle integration replaces the test switch

coordinatePolicy.note: Main characters, NPCs, and animal placements are promoted to canonical position.status exact. User-listed PGs use the coordinate file; absent PG/animals use current runtime mapper pending candidates. X uses the proven +30 internal-world offset; Y is unchanged.
